instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain gear during engine stop event.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall hold current gear when Engine_State equals stopped due to start-stop.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_State = Stopped AND Start_Stop_Mode = Active THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent shifting during engine restart.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block shift commands when engine restart is in progress.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain hydraulic pressure during engine stop.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain minimum clutch pressure during start-stop idle phase.

L4_requirements: IF Start_Stop_Mode = Active AND Engine_State = Stopped THEN Maintain_Min_Clutch_Pressure

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable creep during engine stop.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall remove creep torque when engine is stopped.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_State = Running AND Brake_Pedal = Released THEN Enable_Creep_Torque

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall synchronize gear control during engine restart.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall re-enable shift control once engine restart completes.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent unintended movement during engine stop.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable torque transfer when engine is stopped.

L4_requirements: IF Torque_Transfer_Active = TRUE AND Engine_State = Stopped THEN Trigger_Torque_Fault

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect abnormal restart behavior.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect restart fault when engine restart exceeds time limit.

L4_requirements: IF Restart_Timer > Restart_Time_Limit THEN Restart_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear during start-stop faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when Start_Stop_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent start-stop activation during shifting.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block start-stop activation when shift operation is active.

L4_requirements: IF Start_Stop_Request = TRUE AND Shift_State = Active THEN Reject_Start_Stop_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear start-stop faults after recovery.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear start-stop fault when restart completes successfully.
